chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI M.A. Nos.04 to 12 of 2010 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.735 of 2025 [Urgent Application] 2. For orders on CMA No.736 of 2025 [Exemption Application] 3. For orders on CMA No.737 of 2025 4. For regular hearing 29.04.2025 Mr. Jawad Qureshi, Advocate for Appellant Mr. Khurram Rasheed, Advocate for Respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General, Pakistan ************ 1) Urgency granted. It is informed that the issue in hand as raised in these Appeals is now pending before Appellate Tribunal i.e. Competition Appellate Tribunal, which has been constituted; therefore, these Appeals have become infructuous. Ordered accordingly. Office to place a copy of this order in all connected matters. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
